prompts.name: Quiet Confidence
prompts.text: Create quiet confidence through composed posture, steady eyes, controlled expression, and calm visual strength.

prompts.name: Gentle Loneliness
prompts.text: Create gentle loneliness through negative space, soft expression, muted color, and quiet environmental distance.

prompts.name: First Love
prompts.text: Create a first-love feeling with shy warmth, soft eye contact, delicate blush, and gentle romantic tension.

prompts.name: After Victory
prompts.text: Create an after-victory mood with tired relief, subtle pride, softened lighting, and story-worn detail.

prompts.name: Before the Storm
prompts.text: Create a before-the-storm mood with heavy atmosphere, tense stillness, wind, and dramatic anticipation.

prompts.name: Home Comfort
prompts.text: Create home comfort with warm light, cozy objects, relaxed posture, and safe familiar surroundings.

prompts.name: Secret Wonder
prompts.text: Create secret wonder with curious expression, soft magical glow, hidden detail, and discovery-focused framing.

prompts.name: Bittersweet
prompts.text: Create a bittersweet mood with gentle sadness, warm memory, soft light, and restrained emotional detail.

prompts.name: Festival Joy
prompts.text: Create festival joy with lanterns, crowd warmth, bright expression, food stalls, and celebratory color.

prompts.name: Calm Power
prompts.text: Create calm power with still posture, controlled energy, intense gaze, and restrained dramatic lighting.

prompts.name: Sleepy Morning
prompts.text: Create sleepy morning mood with soft bed light, relaxed expression, messy hair, and gentle domestic detail.

prompts.name: Determined Journey
prompts.text: Create determined journey mood with travel gear, forward motion, purposeful gaze, and open environment.

prompts.name: Melancholy Rain
prompts.text: Create melancholy rain mood with wet reflections, muted color, thoughtful expression, and soft gray light.

prompts.name: Sparkling Stage
prompts.text: Create sparkling stage mood with bright lights, energetic pose, polished costume, and performance confidence.

prompts.name: Peaceful Magic
prompts.text: Create peaceful magic with soft glow, gentle particles, calm expression, and harmonious fantasy atmosphere.
